use_cases: Indicates loading state while fetching data or content
Shows processing status during form submissions
Displays async operation progress in UI transitions
Provides visual feedback during navigation or page loads
Signals ongoing background tasks in dashboards
ai_summary: A three-dot animated loader component with a gooey SVG filter effect that creates smooth, morphing transitions between bouncing dots. Uses CSS keyframe animations combined with SVG feGaussianBlur and feColorMatrix filters for a polished, fluid loading indicator suitable for any interface requiring visual feedback during async operations.
